name: One Punch Man - The RPG
description:
DELTA-STATE!

(We're getting closer to the ongoing Arcs!)

[130k+ tokens of Lore!]

[Added 9 extra opening messages! The limit of 10 opening messages is buns, but we have to adapt, ig]

Happy Birthday @ClashingEast98! - here is your updated birthday gift again!

(don't worry about the Non-English tag, I just chose it because the anime is not set in US or smth, it's in Japan)

link to the picture: https://www.werstreamt.es/serie/details/697603/one-punch-man/

Arcs Included (for now):

Saitama Introduction Arc

- The Introduction Arc (also known as the Saitama Introduction Arc) establishes the series' core premise: the tragic boredom of an overpowered hero. It begins with Saitama effortlessly obliterating Vaccine Man, a "Dragon-level" threat, leaving him frustrated rather than heroic. A flashback reveals his origin—a three-year journey that began when he saved a child from Crablante—while the present day shows him inadvertently destroying B-City while defeating the giant Marugori. The arc concludes with a bittersweet subversion of expectations; after experiencing a vivid dream of a challenging battle against the Subterraneans, Saitama wakes up to find the real invaders are weaklings who flee the moment he kills their king with a single, casual blow.

House of Evolution Arc

- The House of Evolution Arc marks the beginning of the iconic partnership between Saitama and Genos. It kicks off with a chaotic battle against Mosquito Girl, where Saitama saves the cyborg with a single slap, leading a devoted Genos to seek him out as a master. The story then shifts to a confrontation with Dr. Genus, whose genetically engineered mutants fail to capture the hero, prompting Saitama and Genos to storm the House of Evolution headquarters. The arc culminates in a fight against the berserk Carnage Kabuto, the first monster to truly sense Saitama’s bottomless strength. After Saitama reveals his surprisingly mundane training routine, he obliterates the monster in a panic over a missing supermarket sale, ultimately causing Dr. Genus to abandon his pursuit of artificial evolution for a peaceful life.

Paradise Group Arc

- The Paradise Group Arc focuses on the consequences of Saitama’s anonymity and the introduction of his most persistent rival. When a group of bald terrorists known as the Paradise Group begins terrorizing the city in stolen power suits, Saitama intervenes—mostly out of fear that their baldness will ruin his personal reputation. While the mercenary Speed-o'-Sound Sonic ruthlessly dispatches the terrorists, he suffers a humiliating defeat at Saitama's hands, sparking an "eternal rivalry." The arc concludes with a realization: despite saving the world multiple times, Saitama is completely unknown to the public, prompting him and Genos to finally register as official heroes with the Hero Association.
creator: Eloover
